codeReview.summary: The commit correctly adds both switcher test files to OpenBurnBarTests target membership in project.pbxproj, but the feature contract is not fully met because the required scoped -only-testing runs did not succeed (both exited with code 1).

issues.description: Feature expectedBehavior requires scoped xcodebuild -only-testing runs for switcher suites to succeed, but verification in the worker handoff shows the command failed due to unresolved test contracts/types (e.g., SwitcherProfileStore/SwitcherProfileStoreError). As delivered in this feature, acceptance criterion for successful scoped execution was not satisfied.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The switcher-integration-worker skill procedure is too broad for narrow Xcode target-membership tasks; it prescribes integration-test-first development and the full validation stack, but this feature only needed a project membership wiring change and scoped verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure steps 2 and 5) vs transcript skeleton for session 2719d2a3-0755-4888-b929-42e726658097, which performs project.pbxproj edits plus scoped xcodebuild commands only.

summary: Reviewed feature entry, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit 3ee7680 diff. Target-membership wiring in project.pbxproj is correct, but the feature still misses a blocking contract requirement because the mandated scoped xcodebuild test runs did not complete successfully.
